personal.title: Personal Liabilities
personal.description: Informal debts — money owed to family, friends, or other individuals.

institutional.title: Institutional Liabilities
institutional.description: Formal debts — mortgages, bank loans, outstanding credit-card balances.

emptyBody: Create your first {{subtype}} liability to start tracking month-end balances.
deleteRowDescription: {{name}} will be hidden from lists and reports. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
deleteDetailDescription: Snapshots and history will be hidden. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
createDescription: Track a debt your household owes. Personal liabilities are informal (family, friends); institutional are formal (mortgage, bank loan, credit-card balance).
editDescription: Subtype and currency are not editable — create a new liability if those need to change. Ownership is editable.
snapshotsEmpty: No snapshots yet. Click "New snapshot" to record this month's outstanding balance.
